description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 6, 2025 at 8:25 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on I-280 Junipero Serra Freeway near the Monterey Boulevard on-ramp.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound in the second from the right lane on I-280 Junipero Serra Freeway when it slowed to a stop for a 
queue of traffic ahead. While the Waymo AV was stopped, an SUV that was traveling behind the Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV 
from behind and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
